title: Misatos Measurements
wikitext:
[]: Misato's Measurements             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Dec 28, 2007 5:30 pm Now, these are my guesses after playing with the contrast and brightness of the image for a while. 93cm = 36 1/2 inches. 59cm = 23 inches. 47 kilograms = 126 pounds. 163 = 5" 3 inches. In the manga it lists her as a C cup, so using the British system her underbust must be 33 1/2 inches - 3 inch difference, but as the Japanese use metric instead of imperial measurements aren't their cup sizes different and the cups don't go up in inch increments between the bust and underbust like normal? We need a maths nerd to work out how Misato compares to average measurements of women of her height and weight, her dress size, her bust/waist/hip ratio, and all the rest of it, we also need a photoshop nerd to use their magic to remove the scribble and reveal the correct numbers underneath first. This is important!

[]: Re: Misato's Measurements             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Dec 28, 2007 7:17 pm The GREATNESS that is Sir-Mix-a-Lot (spoke/sung and) wrote: Thirty-six, twenty-four, thirty-six, ha ha. Only if she's 5'3"! *record scratches*

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Dec 28, 2007 7:49 pm I'm pretty sure the "93" should be an "83".

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Fri Dec 28, 2007 8:27 pm Any thread about Misato's bust size is okay in my book. Carry on...

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Dec 28, 2007 8:46 pm It looks like an 85 or a 95, IMO. 95 should be right, since one of the old scale comparisions listed her as about 5'4". AO blood type? There's an A, B, AB and O, but not AO. Or does that mean A- (A negative, Rh negative).

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Dec 28, 2007 9:11 pm Does anyone else think she looks an awful lot like Yukari in that mugshot?

[]:             Quote Post by Shawn Dudley » Fri Dec 28, 2007 9:17 pm AO blood type? There's an A, B, AB and O, but not AO. Or does that mean A- (A negative, Rh negative).

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Fri Dec 28, 2007 9:20 pm Misato's mugshot is win.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Dec 28, 2007 10:54 pm this is of vital importance to the Project nonetheless, I don't think we can reliably get the info by playing with the contrast of the above image. We need to see if it is EVER seen at another point.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Dec 29, 2007 1:37 am V wrote: We need to see if it is EVER seen at another point.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Dec 29, 2007 9:02 am NAveryW wrote: I'm pretty sure the "93" should be an "83".

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Dec 29, 2007 9:34 am Zugzwang wrote: NAveryW wrote: I'm pretty sure the "93" should be an "83".

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 29, 2007 2:35 pm Misato's ID is seen again, without the scribbles, in episode 25.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Dec 29, 2007 2:47 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Dec 29, 2007 3:14 pm BrikHaus wrote: Asuka's bust size seems to fluctuate throughout the series, so should we really worry about whether or not its 83 vs. 93? Why not both? Why not throw in 103 just for good measure?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Dec 29, 2007 3:19 pm Asuka's bust size seems to fluctuate throughout the series, so should we really worry about whether or not its 83 vs. 93? Why not both? Why not throw in 103 just for good measure?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Dec 29, 2007 3:44 pm What use is your science if you can't even remove some scribbles from an ID card?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Dec 29, 2007 3:52 pm V: It's 15 minutes into episode 25 of the TV series.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 29, 2007 4:00 pm The piece of paper behind it shows her birthdate, too, 1986/12/8. Wonder what 2010/6/1 and 2008/8/3 are?

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Sat Dec 29, 2007 4:57 pm TriLink wrote: Any thread about Misato's bust size is okay in my book. Carry on...

[]: Misato's Measurements             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Dec 28, 2007 5:30 pm Now, these are my guesses after playing with the contrast and brightness of the image for a while. 93cm = 36 1/2 inches. 59cm = 23 inches. 47 kilograms = 126 pounds. 163 = 5" 3 inches. In the manga it lists her as a C cup, so using the British system her underbust must be 33 1/2 inches - 3 inch difference, but as the Japanese use metric instead of imperial measurements aren't their cup sizes different and the cups don't go up in inch increments between the bust and underbust like normal? We need a maths nerd to work out how Misato compares to average measurements of women of her height and weight, her dress size, her bust/waist/hip ratio, and all the rest of it, we also need a photoshop nerd to use their magic to remove the scribble and reveal the correct numbers underneath first. This is important!
